stars.description: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser
stars.highlights: Liteparse is a fast, open-source document parser that efficiently extracts text from PDFs and images using OCR. It provides a helpful API for developers needing reliable document processing with TypeScript support.
stars.worthReading: It's worth exploring because it offers a practical, production-ready solution for document parsing that's gaining traction among developers, and being starred by Simon Willison suggests it addresses real-world needs.
stars.scoreReason: Moderate freshness with growing stars, good relevance as AI tooling, and high concreteness as a working library.
